title: John Swinney would 'consider' banning US military aircraft from Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: John Swinney would 'consider' banning US military aircraft from Prestwick Airport. First Minister John Swinney has said he would "consider" banning US military aircraft from using Prestwick Airport if it was confirmed…

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney would 'consider' banning US military aircraft from Prestwick Airport
